# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Please check the main branch for the latest security updates. We strongly recommend using the latest release.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| Latest  | :white_check_mark: |
| Older   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability within this project, please report it privately. **Do not disclose it publicly** until it has been addressed.

1.  Please report the vulnerability by opening a private security advisory on GitHub or contacting the maintainers directly.
2.  Include details about the vulnerability, how to reproduce it, and any potential impact.
3.  We will respond to your report as soon as possible, and work to resolve the issue promptly.

Thank you for helping to keep this project secure!
